title: Fts3 offsets() function may report SQLITE_CORRUPT with empty string.
key_bug_features: Fts3 offsets() function with empty string
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE test_fts USING fts3(content TEXT);
SELECT offsets(content, '') FROM test_fts WHERE content MATCH 'Hello';
SELECT offsets(content, '') FROM test_fts WHERE content IS NULL;
